data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong in the next few days. It will be hot during the day over the region. An anticyclone aloft will also cover the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. The weather will be mainly fine over the region. The anticyclone aloft is expected to weaken midweek this week. A trough of low pressure will bring a few showers to southern China in the latter part of this week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260413","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South force 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
